properties.shortDescription: Commit to a minimum Azure spend and unlock discounts across eligible services.
properties.longDescription: Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitments (MACCs) let organizations pre-commit to a minimum Azure spend over 1 or 3 years in exchange for discounted rates. Discounts apply automatically as usage accrues against the commitment balance.

properties.shortDescription: Save on consistent compute spend across Azure services with a flexible hourly commitment.
properties.longDescription: Azure Savings Plans for compute provide discounts on dynamic workloads by committing to an hourly spend for 1 or 3 years. Discounts apply automatically across Virtual Machines, Dedicated Host, Container Instances, App Service, and Azure Functions.
disclaimers: Savings plan purchases cannot be canceled or refunded.
Select compute reservations may be traded in for a savings plan.

properties.shortDescription: Lock in discounted VM pricing for 1 or 3 years with instance size flexibility.
properties.longDescription: Reserved VM Instances provide significant savings over pay-as-you-go pricing for stable Virtual Machine workloads. Instance size flexibility automatically covers different VM sizes within the same series and region.
disclaimers: Exchanges for different instance series or regions are available until further notice.
Refunds are subject to a $50,000 USD cap per 12-month rolling window per billing scope.
